descriptionShort: AHL game footage from 1989 featuring Matt Hervey and Brian Bladnick with Moncton Hawks vs. Newmarket Saints.
descriptionLong: Archival footage from a 1989 AHL regular-season game between the Moncton Hawks and Newmarket Saints. The clip features Richmond Sockeyes alumni Matt Hervey and Brian Bladnick competing at the professional level. Specific date within 1989 is unclear from available metadata.
